ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json skipNullOn="everywhere" --- payload.data.customers default [] map (customer) -> { id: "ORACLE-EBS-" ++ (customer.customerAccountNumber as String), externalIds: { oracleCustomerId: customer.customerAccountNumber as String }, sourceSystems: ["ORACLE_EBS"], name: customer.customerAccountName default customer.partyName, customerType: if (["PERSON", "INDIVIDUAL"] contains upper((customer.accountType default "") as String)) "INDIVIDUAL" else "BUSINESS", status: if (!(customer.activeFlag default true)) "INACTIVE" else if (upper((customer.accountStatus default "") as String) == "INACTIVE") "INACTIVE" else "ACTIVE", contacts: if ( customer.primaryContactName != null or customer.emailAddress != null or customer.phoneNumber != null ) [ { role: "PRIMARY", name: customer.primaryContactName, email: customer.emailAddress, phone: customer.phoneNumber } ] else null, addresses: if (customer.addressLine1 != null) [ { addressType: if (upper((customer.siteUseCode default "") as String) == "SHIP_TO") "SHIPPING" else "BILLING", line1: customer.addressLine1, line2: customer.addressLine2, city: customer.city, state: customer.stateOrProvince, postalCode: customer.postalCode, country: customer.countryCode } ] else null, metadata: { partyNumber: customer.partyNumber, partyName: customer.partyName, customerClassCode: customer.customerClassCode, accountSiteNumber: customer.accountSiteNumber, siteUseCode: customer.siteUseCode }, createdDate: customer.createdDate, lastModifiedDate: customer.lastUpdatedDate
}

%dw 2.0 output application/json skipNullOn = "everywhere" --- payload.data.customers default [] map (customer) -> { id: "SF-BRILM-" ++ (customer.salesforceAccountId as String), externalIds: { salesforceAccountId: customer.salesforceAccountId }, sourceSystems: ["SF_BRILM"], name: customer.accountName, customerType: if (["PERSON", "INDIVIDUAL"] contains upper((customer.accountType default "") as String)) "INDIVIDUAL" else "BUSINESS", status: if (!(customer.activeFlag default true)) "INACTIVE" else "ACTIVE", contacts: if (customer.phoneNumber != null) [ { role: "PRIMARY", phone: customer.phoneNumber } ] else null, addresses: ( if ( customer.billingStreet != null and customer.billingCity != null and customer.billingCountry != null ) [ { addressType: "BILLING", line1: customer.billingStreet, city: customer.billingCity, state: customer.billingState, postalCode: customer.billingPostalCode, country: customer.billingCountry } ] else [] ) ++ ( if ( customer.shippingStreet != null and customer.shippingCity != null and customer.shippingCountry != null ) [ { addressType: "SHIPPING", line1: customer.shippingStreet, city: customer.shippingCity, state: customer.shippingState, postalCode: customer.shippingPostalCode, country: customer.shippingCountry } ] else [] ), metadata: { externalId: customer.externalId, accountNumber: customer.accountNumber, website: customer.website, industry: customer.industry, accountType: customer.accountType, ownerId: customer.ownerId }, createdDate: customer.createdDate, lastModifiedDate: customer.lastModifiedDate }

%dw 2.0 output application/json skipNullOn = "everywhere" --- payload.data.customers default [] map (customer) -> { id: "SF-UMBRE-" ++ (customer.salesforceAccountId as String), externalIds: { salesforceAccountId: customer.salesforceAccountId }, sourceSystems: ["SF_UMBRE"], name: customer.accountName, customerType: if (["PERSON", "INDIVIDUAL"] contains upper((customer.accountType default "") as String)) "INDIVIDUAL" else "BUSINESS", status: if (!(customer.activeFlag default true)) "INACTIVE" else "ACTIVE", contacts: if (customer.phoneNumber != null) [ { role: "PRIMARY", phone: customer.phoneNumber } ] else null, addresses: ( if ( customer.billingStreet != null and customer.billingCity != null and customer.billingCountry != null ) [ { addressType: "BILLING", line1: customer.billingStreet, city: customer.billingCity, state: customer.billingState, postalCode: customer.billingPostalCode, country: customer.billingCountry } ] else [] ) ++ ( if ( customer.shippingStreet != null and customer.shippingCity != null and customer.shippingCountry != null ) [ { addressType: "SHIPPING", line1: customer.shippingStreet, city: customer.shippingCity, state: customer.shippingState, postalCode: customer.shippingPostalCode, country: customer.shippingCountry } ] else [] ), metadata: { externalId: customer.externalId, accountNumber: customer.accountNumber, website: customer.website, industry: customer.industry, accountType: customer.accountType, ownerId: customer.ownerId }, createdDate: customer.createdDate, lastModifiedDate: customer.lastModifiedDate }

%dw 2.0 output application/json skipNullOn = "everywhere" --- payload.data.customers default [] map (customer) -> { id: "SAP-ECC-" ++ (customer.sapCustomerNumber as String), externalIds: { sapCustomerNumber: customer.sapCustomerNumber }, sourceSystems: ["SAP_ECC"], name: if (customer.nameLine2 != null) (customer.nameLine1 default "") ++ " " ++ (customer.nameLine2 default "") else customer.nameLine1, customerType: "BUSINESS", status: if (!(customer.deletionFlag default false) or !(customer.centralPostingBlock default false)) "INACTIVE" else "ACTIVE", contacts: if (customer.emailAddress != null or customer.phoneNumber != null) [ { role: "PRIMARY", email: customer.emailAddress, phone: customer.phoneNumber } ] else null, addresses: if ( customer.streetAddress != null and customer.city != null and customer.countryCode != null ) [ { addressType: "BILLING", line1: customer.streetAddress, city: customer.city, state: customer.region, postalCode: customer.postalCode, country: customer.countryCode } ] else null, metadata: { accountGroup: customer.accountGroup, companyCode: customer.companyCode, salesOrganization: customer.salesOrganization, distributionChannel: customer.distributionChannel, division: customer.division, searchTerm: customer.searchTerm, taxNumber1: customer.taxNumber1, taxNumber2: customer.taxNumber2, createdBy: customer.createdBy }, createdDate: customer.createdDate, lastModifiedDate: customer.lastChangedDate }

%dw 2.0 output application/json import nowUtc from modules::datetime::utils --- { dateTime: nowUtc(), httpStatus: 200, status: "SUCCESS", message: "Customer records retrieved successfully.", correlationId: correlationId, data: { customers: payload, recordCount: sizeOf(payload) } }

scatter-gather.doc:name: Get Customer by ID from all Sources

logger.doc:name: Debug - Not Found
logger.message: No account found in the Brilliant Mule Salesforce instance for the provided ID

logger.doc:name: Debug - Not Found
logger.message: No account found in the Umbrella Salesforce instance for the provided ID

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- (flatten(valuesOf(payload) map ((result) -> result.*payload)) filter ((object) -> object != {}))[0]

raise-error.description: An unexpected error occurred while processing the request

logger.doc:name: Debug - Forwarding event to SF_BRILM
logger.message: Forwarding event to SF_BRILM for processing

logger.doc:name: Debug - Forwarding event to SF_UMBRE
logger.message: Forwarding event to SF_UMBRE for processing

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json import nowUtc from modules::datetime::utils --- { dateTime: nowUtc(), httpStatus: 200, status: "SUCCESS", message: "Customer synchronization event processed successfully.", correlationId: correlationId, data: { recordCount: 1, processedCount: 1 } }
